action.reasoning: Observation: After 30 epochs, val exprate=0.1481. Loss is still declining (1.04 at epoch 30). The model is learning well - from 0.0042 to 0.1481. Each epoch takes ~60s, so 30 epochs = ~30 min. Analysis: The model is still improving - loss declining and exprate trending up. I should continue training for more epochs. With 3.7h remaining and ~60s/epoch, I can do ~200 more epochs. But I should also submit eval first to get a baseline test score. Decision: Submit eval with current best checkpoint, then continue training for 50 more epochs.
